project_name: C O D E X Family Web Portal
archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Modified for Dark Gothic / Mafia Aesthetic

layout.spacing_philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-16 inside sections. gap-8 to gap-12 for bento grids.
layout.bento_grid: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with intense asymmetry. Direct children styled with p-8 border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm relative overflow-hidden

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background bg-[#121212] with 1px solid border-zinc-800. No heavy box shadows, focus on crisp, sharp borders. Hover state: border-red-900/50 transition-colors duration-300.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Shadcn UI overrides: bg-black border-zinc-800 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#8A0303] focus:border-[#8A0303] rounded-none text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Sharp corners. Primary CTA: bg-[#8A0303] hover:bg-[#A10A0A] text-white px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-all. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-500 text-zinc-300.

hero_background.description: Cinematic wide shot of a dark gothic mansion at night, heavy fog. Use with heavy black/bottom gradient overlay.

provided_logo.description: CODEX gothic font with black background, cross silhouette, monochrome flowers
provided_logo.usage: Use in the 'About/Lore' bento grid or floating in the hero section as a decorative crest, not as the primary navbar logo (use text for nav).

texture_bg.description: Abstract dark texture with silver/red splatters.

form_bg.usage: Side-panel image next to the Application Form.

city_night.usage: Decorative element for the footer or 'Why Join Us' background.

content_requirements.placeholder_rule: Use 'неизвестно' (unknown) for any missing lore, history, or specific names/stats not provided in the prompt.

elements: Content: Placeholders 'неизвестно' describing history and values.
Visual: The provided_logo image placed artistically in a bento card.
Cards: Grid of members (Главы семьи, Важные люди). Name: 'Неизвестно', Role: 'Неизвестно'.
Fields required: Ник в игре (Nick), Discord, Возраст (Age), Статик ID (Static ID), Почему к нам? (Why join), Опыт РП (RP Experience).

admin_dashboard.auth: Login page at /admin. Hardcoded logic for now: User 'alex', Password '123'.
views: Moderators Management (Assign moderators who can also view/process applications).

animations.hover: Subtle opacity and border color changes. 300ms ease.
animations.scroll: Fade up text sections using Framer Motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1).

instructions_to_main_agent: 3. Apply fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;700;900&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;600&display=swap');
4. Use Framer Motion for scroll animations, but keep it performant and subtle (no chaotic bouncing).
5. Use Shadcn UI for the application form, login form, and admin data tables/cards.
6. Build a custom masonry/bento layout for the 'Lore' section.
7. Implement hardcoded mock login for 'alex'/'123' using simple Context or localStorage for MVP.
8. Ensure the aesthetic feels like a high-end mafia syndicate. No generic SaaS look. Use dark #050505 backgrounds and #8A0303 blood red accents.
9. Put data-testid attributes on all form inputs and submit buttons.
